case_title: OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. ABHYUDAYA AGRAWAL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-15-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGRAWAL, ABHYUDAYA $1,589.94 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,789.94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.
NEW HEARING. FILED BY ABHYUDAYA AGRAWAL IS GRANTED. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT AGRAWAL, ABHYUDAYA

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NEW HEARING. PER SC-105A ORDER GRANTING THE REQUEST TO VACATE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON APR-15-2011. HEARING SET FOR FEB-15-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT AGRAWAL, ABHYUDAYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED" AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO APR-15-2011 AT 10:00 AM DEPT.#506. PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AGRAWAL, ABHYUDAYA
